channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Researchers Explore the Link Between Parkinson's Disease and Gut Health
item.description: Scientists are investigating a growing body of evidence suggesting the gut microbiome may play a role in the development and progression of Parkinson's disease.

item.title: La conexión entre la diabetes y el cáncer pancreático
item.description: El número de personas con diabetes en Estados Unidos sigue aumentando, y muchos no saben que la padecen. Sin tratamiento, la enfermedad puede elevar el riesgo de cáncer pancreático.

item.title: The Link Between Diabetes and Pancreatic Cancer
item.description: Diabetes rates in the United States continue to rise, with many cases going undetected. Left unmanaged, the condition has been associated with an elevated risk of pancreatic cancer.

item.title: Understanding Presbyopia: What It Is and What to Do About It
item.description: Presbyopia, a common age-related vision condition, causes difficulty focusing on close objects. Experts outline symptoms, causes, and available treatment options.
